meta.title: The Council of Elders — 9 Elders (NSA holds the 9th seat; 10th reserved)
meta.source: github.com/timjlatimer/personal-ai-os-vault/03_COUNCIL/_COUNCIL_ROSTER.md (June 2026 canon — supersedes the older 8-Elder card) via hb1000-os/blueprint/github-vault-canon.md §1.3
covenant: Agents do 80%. Tim does 20%. If Tim's share creeps over 20%, the dashboard turns red and the Council triages.
Span of control = 8-10 Elders max. Anything else is a worker agent reporting to an Elder.
HIL queue capped at 10 items. Full queue = Council triages before anything reaches Tim.
meta.voice: Internal voice = Ghost Tim clone (KIE.ai — Standing Order #1: KIE.ai ONLY). External voice per project.
meta.governance: Three-File Governance (law per Manus adoption May 25, 2026): every Elder spec = Markdown (.md, the WHY) + JSON Schema (schema.json, strict structure) + Python wrapper (enforce.py, executable hard gate). Every agent (Elder or worker) has: budget (tokens + dollars), role, reporting line, audit trail.
meta.why_nsa_got_her_seat: "Shared accountability = no accountability. Two parents, no parent." Three distinct verbs: "Empathy Enforcer ADVOCATES; Compliance Marshal ENFORCES RULES; NSA ENFORCES ALIGNMENT."

elders.name: The Cartographer
elders.cliche: You can't fix what you can't see.

elders.name: The Compliance Marshal
elders.portfolio: Legal, ethics, Standing Orders + Three-File Governance

elders.name: The Town Crier
elders.cliche: The buck stops here — only when it must.

elders.name: The Empathy Enforcer
elders.portfolio: Local North Star advocacy, Empty Chair votes
elders.cliche: There but for the grace of God go I.

elders.name: The North Star Agent (NSA)
elders.portfolio: Always-on alignment enforcer · Twin North Star Gate · Vivid Vision Rhyme Test · Phase 0 Step 5 hard halt
elders.cliche: The flag never droops on her watch.
elders.notes: NSA runs continuously ACROSS all other Elders — cross-cutting enforcement, not a peer. Escalation ladder: Aspirin (gentle inline nudge) → Treatment (formal citation, audit-logged, Bartender Briefing) → Fever (agent paused, HIL queue entry, Tim alerted within 10 min). Inherits The Watchman v2.1 + Iron Brief v1.4; uses the PFE (Persistent Foraging Engine). Autonomy Score capped at 95% — Tim always in the loop for North Star sign-off. Weekly 🟢/🟡/🔴 Rhyme Integrity per project in the Bartender Briefing.

bartender_briefing: Auto-generated every Monday: 'Five sentences from The Town Crier. Five minutes to read. What happened, what's working, what's stuck, what needs Tim, what comes next.' Plus Council Headlines — one line per Elder.
